name: Nomdara Whirlpool Safe-Passage Lane
feel: This lane exists through bargaining, escort discipline, and route memory more than map permanence; convoy authority travels with it.
paperwork_and_permission_model: Travel along Nomdara Whirlpool Safe-Passage Lane is easiest when intentions, cargo, and patronage are legible before questions begin.
patrol_rhythm: Daylight oversight is visible and procedural; night oversight is thinner, more suspicious, and less forgiving.
after_dark_change: After sunset, traffic thins, trust narrows, and informal power brokers matter more than posted rules.
